clubs.name: GDG on Campus VIT Bhopal
clubs.description: Google Developer Groups on Campus chapter at VIT Bhopal, fostering a community of developers through workshops, hackathons, and study jams on Google technologies.

clubs.name: AI & ML Club
clubs.description: Dedicated to exploring artificial intelligence and machine learning through research projects, Kaggle competitions, and hands-on workshops at VIT Bhopal.

clubs.name: Android Club
clubs.description: A passionate community of mobile app developers building innovative Android applications and learning Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, and modern development practices.

clubs.name: Linux Club
clubs.description: Promoting open-source culture and Linux-based development at VIT Bhopal through install-fests, kernel talks, and contributions to FOSS projects.

clubs.name: OWASP VITB
clubs.description: The official OWASP student chapter focused on cybersecurity awareness, CTF competitions, and ethical hacking workshops to build a security-first mindset.

clubs.name: CSI Chapter
clubs.description: Computer Society of India student chapter organizing technical seminars, coding marathons, and industry speaker sessions to bridge the gap between academia and industry.

clubs.name: Software Dev Club
clubs.description: A hub for full-stack developers to collaborate on real-world projects, learn modern frameworks, and participate in open-source contributions.

clubs.name: IoT Club
clubs.description: Exploring the Internet of Things ecosystem through hands-on projects with Arduino, Raspberry Pi, and cloud-connected smart devices at VIT Bhopal.

clubs.name: Data Science Club
clubs.description: Empowering students with data analytics, visualization, and statistical modeling skills through workshops, datasets challenges, and guest lectures from industry experts.

clubs.name: Competitive Programming Club
clubs.description: Sharpening problem-solving and algorithmic skills through regular contests on Codeforces, LeetCode, and CodeChef while preparing teams for ICPC regionals.

clubs.name: Music & Band Club
clubs.description: The heartbeat of campus culture, bringing together vocalists, instrumentalists, and beatboxers for jam sessions, open mics, and performances at VIT Bhopal fests.

clubs.name: Dance Club
clubs.description: A vibrant dance community covering contemporary, hip-hop, classical, and freestyle genres, performing at college fests and inter-university competitions.

clubs.name: Dramatics Club
clubs.description: Bringing stories to life through theatre, street plays, and nukkad naataks, cultivating the performing arts scene on campus with regular stage productions.

clubs.name: Photography Club
clubs.description: Capturing campus life and beyond through the lens, hosting photo walks, editing workshops, and exhibitions to nurture visual storytelling skills.

clubs.name: VIT Animation
clubs.description: A creative collective of 2D and 3D animators, motion graphics designers, and visual effects enthusiasts producing short films and animated content.

clubs.name: English Literary Association
clubs.description: Celebrating the art of the written and spoken word through poetry slams, essay competitions, creative writing workshops, and open mic nights.

clubs.name: Debate Society
clubs.description: Training eloquent speakers and critical thinkers through parliamentary and British-style debates, hosting inter-college debate tournaments on campus.

clubs.name: MUNSOC
clubs.description: The Model United Nations Society at VIT Bhopal, organizing MUN conferences and preparing delegates for national and international simulations of UN committees.

clubs.name: Anchoring Group
clubs.description: Grooming confident stage hosts and emcees who lead campus events, fests, and ceremonies with poise and engaging communication skills.

clubs.name: Hindi Literary Association
clubs.description: Promoting Hindi literature and oratory through kavi sammelans, story-writing contests, and nukkad naataks that celebrate the richness of Hindi culture.

clubs.name: Rotaract Club
clubs.description: A Rotary-affiliated community service club at VIT Bhopal organizing blood donation drives, literacy campaigns, and social impact projects for local communities.

clubs.name: Leo Club
clubs.description: Lions Club International's youth wing empowering students through leadership development, community service initiatives, and environmental awareness campaigns.

clubs.name: NSS - National Service Scheme
clubs.description: Engaging students in meaningful social service through village adoption programs, cleanliness drives, health camps, and disaster relief activities across Madhya Pradesh.

clubs.name: Youth Red Cross
clubs.description: Promoting humanitarian values through first-aid training, blood donation camps, health awareness sessions, and community outreach under the Red Cross banner.

clubs.name: Entrepreneurship Cell (E-Cell)
clubs.description: Fostering the startup culture at VIT Bhopal through pitch competitions, incubation support, mentorship programs, and entrepreneurship summits with industry leaders.

clubs.name: Otaku Club
clubs.description: A haven for anime and manga enthusiasts hosting watch parties, cosplay events, fan-art contests, and discussions on the latest seasonal anime at VIT Bhopal.

clubs.name: Movie Making Club
clubs.description: Aspiring filmmakers crafting short films, documentaries, and music videos while learning cinematography, screenwriting, and post-production techniques.

clubs.name: Gaming Club
clubs.description: Uniting casual and competitive gamers through esports tournaments, LAN parties, and game development jams across PC, console, and mobile platforms.

clubs.name: Robotics Club
clubs.description: Designing and building autonomous robots for national competitions like Robocon, while exploring ROS, computer vision, and mechanical design principles.

clubs.name: IoT & Embedded Systems Club
clubs.description: Diving deep into microcontrollers, sensor networks, and embedded firmware development for smart systems and industrial automation projects.

clubs.name: Drone Club
clubs.description: Building and flying custom drones for aerial photography, autonomous navigation challenges, and participating in national-level drone racing competitions.

clubs.name: Sports Club
clubs.description: The umbrella sports body at VIT Bhopal coordinating inter-college tournaments, intramural leagues, and fitness events across multiple disciplines.

clubs.name: Trekking Club
clubs.description: Organizing adventurous treks, nature trails, and camping trips across Madhya Pradesh and beyond, promoting outdoor fitness and team bonding.

clubs.name: Yoga Club
clubs.description: Promoting holistic wellness through daily yoga sessions, meditation workshops, and International Yoga Day celebrations on campus.

clubs.name: Cubing Club
clubs.description: A community of speedcubers mastering Rubik's cubes and twisty puzzles, hosting campus-level competitions and teaching solving techniques to beginners.

clubs.name: Cricket Club
clubs.description: Nurturing cricketing talent through regular net practice, intra-campus leagues, and representing VIT Bhopal at inter-university cricket tournaments.
